title: Every Mining Dimension
description: This mod adds mining worlds such as: overworld, nether and the end
body:
### What does this mod add?

* Embark on an exciting journey to new dimensions with the **Every Dimension Mining**! 

- Conquer the dimensions, starting with the **Overworld Mining Dimension**, where countless resources from the normal world await you. But this is only the beginning!

* Head to the **Nether Mining Dimension**, where resources from the Nether await you.

- You can also go to the **End Mining Dimension**, where end stone wastelands await you.

**Create teleportation blocks to easily move between these exciting worlds.**

## Teleports
